seoTitle: Werrikimbe vs Werrington County — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Werrikimbe and Werrington County. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Werrikimbe vs Werrington County: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Werrikimbe and Werrington County.
heading: Werrikimbe vs Werrington County — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Werrikimbe, New South Wales and Werrington County, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Werrikimbe has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Werrington County (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Werrikimbe or Werrington County safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Werrikimbe has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Werrington County scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Werrikimbe scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Werrington County scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Werrikimbe or Werrington County?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Werrikimbe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
